comment: WS3 golden fixture (redacted, NOT a raw live probe). GET /invoices/{id} wire shape: tax/discount are x100-scaled integers (10% reads back as 1000, 5% as 500); note/subject are present on a real fetched invoice (POST drops them). Byte-identical to scripts/mock-clockify-server.mjs so it is the single source of truth shared with the mock-contract gate. Replayed offline: invoiceUpdateBodyFromExisting maps tax 1000 -> taxPercent 10, discount 500 -> discountPercent 5.
